topic: best sub shop — Sully's vs Al's

turns.content: ok I need you to settle a debate for me rn me and the boys have been goin back and forth on this for like two hours
Ha, alright I'm ready. What's the debate?
best sub shop in southie sullys or als. this is a serious question bro do not take this lightly

I appreciate the gravity of this situation. Both are solid spots with loyal followings in Southie. I think it really depends on what you're ordering — some places do certain subs better than others. What's your take and what's your go-to order?

bro sullys italian is the best sub ive ever had in my life and ive been goin there since I was like 10 years old the bread is perfect every single time and they dont skimp on the meat like some places do

A good Italian sub lives and dies by the bread, so if Sully's has that dialed in, that's a huge point in their favor. There's also something to be said for the loyalty factor — when you've been going to a spot since you were a kid, they know how to make it right. What's the case for Al's?
so danny and like half the guys swear by als they say the steak and cheese there is unbeatable and I gotta admit its pretty good but I still think sullys is better overall like across the whole menu

That's a fair distinction — one place might have the single best item while the other is more consistent across the board. A lot of sub shop debates come down to exactly that. If Al's has the superior steak and cheese but Sully's wins on Italians and overall variety, those are almost two different categories.

see thats what im sayin but danny wont hear it hes like als steak and cheese is all that matters and im like bro theres more to life than steak and cheese what about the meatball what about the turkey club sullys crushes those

Danny is doing the classic thing where one incredible item blinds you to everything else. If Sully's beats Al's on Italians, meatball, and turkey club, that's a 3-1 advantage with Al's only winning on steak and cheese. Volume of wins should count for something.
THANK YOU bro im screenshottin this and sendin it to the group chat right now danny is gonna be heated lol

Ha, glad I could provide some backup for your argument. Though I'm sure Danny will just come back with something like "quality over quantity" and say the steak and cheese is the only sub that matters. This debate is probably never getting fully settled.
oh yeah hes definitely gonna say that but then I'll just be like ok go order a meatball sub from als and tell me its better than sullys with a straight face cause he cant do it nobody can

That's a strong move. If he can't defend Al's across multiple items, the argument kind of falls apart. One great sub does not make a great sub shop — consistency across the menu is what separates a good spot from a legendary one.
nah it really wont weve been havin this argument since like middle school and we aint stoppin now lol alright bro I gotta go grab food ironically and yeah im goin to sullys obviously
As you should. Get that Italian and enjoy it. Tell Danny he's welcome to his steak and cheese but the people have spoken. Take it easy man!
